text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Hey, I just remembered — Oguri was all
pumped for some eatin' contest that's
comin' up.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Oh? That sounds like a blast! I'm not one
to miss a festival. Maybe I should join.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Grrr… I might lose to Oguri, but there's
no way I'm losin' to someone my own size!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: That does it! Count me in! Prepare to lose big time!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Well, doesn't that sound fun.
I wish the best of luck to both of you♪

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Come on, Creek, it's now or never.
Don'tcha wanna show off your stuff too?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, it's fine. I'll be at the infirmary, ready to
take care of you two when you collapse♪

text_block_list.name: Both
text_block_list.text:
Da heck! You think we can't handle it?!
Za heck! You think we can't handle it?!
